rationale: Trump's claimed Iran settlement eases energy price pressure marginally, but no qualitative change for Poland's security or economy beyond what was already priced in last cycle.

top_events.title: Trump claims US-Iran 'great settlement', cancels strikes, markets surge
top_events.summary: Stock markets rally on news of a US-Iran deal; potential downward pressure on oil prices could slightly ease energy costs for Polish consumers, but deal remains unconfirmed structurally.

top_events.title: El Niño confirmed active, threatens weather extremes
top_events.summary: Scientists confirm El Niño is underway; elevated risk of weather anomalies in Europe including Poland (droughts, heatwaves, disrupted harvests) in coming months.

top_events.title: Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon kill 17
top_events.summary: Continued Israeli military action in Lebanon; no direct impact on Poland but contributes to regional Middle East instability affecting energy markets.
